title: De divisione naturae
author: Joannes Scotus Eriugena
classification_notes: Selected PL122 import. Eriugena's De divisione naturae, also known as Periphyseon, is a major medieval Latin philosophical dialogue integrating Christian theology, Greek patristic sources, and Neoplatonic metaphysics. Imported text remains marked for segmentation/front-matter review.

title: De praedestinatione
author: Joannes Scotus Eriugena
classification_notes: Selected PL122 import. De praedestinatione is an important Carolingian theological work associated with the predestination controversy and useful for medieval Latin theology and intellectual history. Imported text remains marked for segmentation/front-matter review.
